description_long: This is a detached residential bungalow surrounded by a low fence and featuring a spacious yard with a tree and a paved driveway. The main building has a hip roof and multiple rectangular windows, with a prominent front entrance flanked by columns. A separate garage structure is connected to the main house by a short walkway, and two cars are parked in the driveway. The property includes a small patio area and a side yard, with the fence enclosing the entire lot. The exterior walls are smooth and light-colored, while the roof is dark and steeply pitched. The overall design is clean and orderly, with symmetrical window placement on the front facade.
description: A light-colored hip-roofed bungalow with a fenced yard, separate garage, and symmetrical front entrance with columns.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the backyard, a tree, and the back of the main house with windows and a patio area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side yard, and the connection between the garage and the main house.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the main entrance with columns, two parked cars, and symmetrical windows on the facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and the side of the main house with additional windows and a tree.
